task:
Import /home/user/Pictures/portrait_circle.jpg into the darktable library.

Enable the 'exposure' module with a negative EV (decrease exposure), and apply a drawn circle mask centered on the subject's face with the mask inverted/polarized so the exposure reduction only affects the area outside the circle (yielding a soft vignette while the face is protected). Apply the tag 'drawn_circle_mask' to the image and export it as a JPEG to /home/user/Pictures/portrait_circle_vignette.jpg.

verification.description: exposure module with drawn mask applied
